moments.title: World Cup Knockouts Begin
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted by the USA, Mexico, and Canada, moves into its high-stakes Round of 32 from Sunday, June 28.

angles.name: Knockout Drama
angles.copy: The talking points are about to get serious as the FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off its knockout stages this weekend. Who's making it through? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: UK Interest
angles.copy: It's win or go home! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 starts Sunday. Are you ready for the drama from North America?

moments.title: Love Island S13 Ongoing
moments.blurb: The thirteenth series of Love Island continues nightly on ITV2, with Maya Jama hosting all the Villa action from Mallorca.

angles.name: Daily Recaps
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island Villa. What's got you talking from last night's episode? #LoveIsland

angles.name: Evening Tune-in
angles.copy: Who's coupling up tonight? Grab your snacks, Love Island is back on ITV2 for more sun-drenched chaos.

moments.title: House of the Dragon S3 Live
moments.blurb: Season 3 of the Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, is currently streaming on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max, having premiered on June 22.

angles.name: Dragon Talk
angles.copy: Back in Westeros: House of the Dragon Season 3 is already delivering the fire and blood. What are your early thoughts on the new episodes?

angles.name: Catch Up
angles.copy: If you're not already deep into Season 3 of House of the Dragon, what are you waiting for? It's streaming now and full of twists.

moments.title: The Bear S5 Out Now
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the critically acclaimed series The Bear began streaming today, June 26, on Disney+.

angles.name: Chef's Kiss
angles.copy: Yes, chef! The Bear Season 5 is officially streaming on Disney+ from today. Time to dive back into the chaos of the kitchen.

angles.name: Binge Alert
angles.copy: Your weekend plans just got better: The Bear Season 5 just dropped! Who's binging the new episodes right away?

moments.title: Kellie Pickler's 40th
moments.blurb: American country pop singer Kellie Pickler, known for 'Red High Heels' and 'I Wonder', turns 40 on Sunday, June 28.

angles.name: Happy 40th
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 40th birthday to country star Kellie Pickler! What's your favourite song from her?

moments.title: Ian Paice's 78th
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only constant member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on Sunday, June 28.

angles.name: Rock Legend Bday
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday to Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice! Still rocking harder than anyone. #DeepPurple

moments.title: Colin Hay's 73rd
moments.blurb: Scottish-Australian singer-songwriter Colin Hay, best known as the frontman of Men at Work, turns 73 on Sunday, June 28.

angles.name: Men At Work Bday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the voice of Men at Work, Colin Hay! Still got 'Down Under' stuck in your head? #MenAtWork

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger's 48th
moments.blurb: Pussycat Dolls lead singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on Sunday, June 28.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll Bday
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish her a happy birthday? Happy 48th to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger! #PussycatDolls

moments.title: Don Dokken's 73rd
moments.blurb: Don Dokken, frontman of the American heavy metal band Dokken, turns 73 on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Metal Birthday
angles.copy: Screaming a massive happy 73rd birthday to Dokken's very own Don Dokken! What's your favourite Dokken track?

moments.title: Cheryl Ann Tweedy's 43rd
moments.blurb: British pop sensation Cheryl Ann Tweedy (Cheryl Cole), known from Girls Aloud and her solo career, celebrates her 43rd birthday on Tuesday, June 30.

angles.name: Girls Aloud Bday
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to the UK's own pop princess, Cheryl Ann Tweedy! What's your top Girls Aloud or solo hit?

moments.title: Philip Adrian Wright's 70th
moments.blurb: Philip Adrian Wright, keyboardist and former Director of Visuals for The Human League, turns 70 on Tuesday, June 30.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer Bday
angles.copy: Don't you want him, baby? Wishing a very happy 70th birthday to Philip Adrian Wright of The Human League! #TheHumanLeague

moments.title: Missy Elliott's 55th
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Iconic Rapper Bday
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On and wish a very happy 55th birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott! A true game-changer in music. #MissyElliott

moments.title: Debbie Harry's 81st
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic lead singer, Debbie Harry, the ultimate new wave and punk trailblazer, turns 81 on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Legend Bday
angles.copy: Call Me! It's Debbie Harry's 81st birthday today! The legendary Blondie frontwoman still reigns supreme. #DebbieHarry

moments.title: Elle Series Premiere
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', exploring the origin story of Elle Woods, premieres on Prime Video on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Bend & Snap Backstory
angles.copy: Omigod you guys! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel series 'Elle' arrives on Prime Video this Wednesday. Get ready to see how Elle Woods became, well, Elle Woods!

angles.name: New Streaming Must-Watch
angles.copy: Your mid-week streaming just got a whole lot brighter! 'Elle', the 'Legally Blonde' prequel, drops July 1st. Who's excited?

moments.title: John Waite's 74th
moments.blurb: British rock singer John Waite, known for The Babys, Bad English, and his solo hit 'Missing You', turns 74 on Saturday, July 4.

angles.name: Rock Star Bday
angles.copy: Are you 'Missing You' this Saturday? It's John Waite's 74th birthday! The British rock legend still sounds incredible. #JohnWaite

moments.title: Ralph Johnson's 75th
moments.blurb: Ralph Johnson, the percussionist and vocalist for the iconic funk and soul band Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday, July 4.

angles.name: Funk Legend Bday
angles.copy: Shining bright on his 75th birthday! Happy birthday to Ralph Johnson of Earth, Wind & Fire! What's your favourite EWF jam?

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st
moments.blurb: American rapper and singer Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Circles', turns 31 on Saturday, July 4.

angles.name: Pop Star Bday
angles.copy: Cheers to Post Malone on his 31st birthday this Saturday! What's your go-to track from the genre-bending artist?

moments.title: Huey Lewis's 76th
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of the iconic American rock band Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 on Sunday, July 5.

angles.name: Power of Love Bday
angles.copy: It's hip to be square, and it's Huey Lewis's 76th birthday this Sunday! Celebrating the man behind some classic 80s hits. #HueyLewis

moments.title: 50 Cent's 51st
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman Curtis '50 Cent' Jackson celebrates his 51st birthday on Monday, July 6.

angles.name: In Da Club Bday
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Happy 51st to the one and only 50 Cent. What's his ultimate track for you?

moments.title: Andy Scott's 77th
moments.blurb: Andy Scott, lead guitarist for glam rock band Sweet, who was born in Wrexham, Wales, turns 77 on Tuesday, June 30.

angles.name: Wrexham Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Wrexham's own glam rock legend, Andy Scott of Sweet! Still got 'Ballroom Blitz' on repeat?
